creator: thoma555-bsd@yahoo.com
text: I don't think the x86 code has a problem.  It looks like the arm64 code keeps a list of virtual addresses for cache operations and the list doesn't get reset when bounce_bus_dmamap_load_buffer() fails with EFBIG.  I think it's because map->sync_count isn't reset to zero that the next call fails.  That was introduced after the arm64 code was cloned from x86.
